heading: Repealed. ,Feb. 20, 1931, ch. 23546 Stat. 1191
label: 418 Repealed. ,Feb. 20, 1931, ch. 23546 Stat. 1191
notes: Section, , , was in opinion of Judge Advocate General repealed by act , providing that no real estate of the Department of the Army should be disposed of without authority of Congress and providing “all existing acts or parts thereof in conflict with this proviso, other than special acts for the sale of stated tracts of land, are hereby repealed.” See J.A.G. 611, .act Mar. 3, 1925, ch. 41843 Stat. 1104Feb. 20, 1931Dec. 3, 1931
